items.title: Virgin and Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣母低垂的目光，胜过千言万语。
items.cardline: Her downcast eyes speak louder than words.

items.title: The Tale of Sumiyoshi
items.cardline_zh: 画卷轻展，千年故事在屏风上低语。
items.cardline: Unfurling tales whispered on ancient screens.

items.title: The Plains of Musashi
items.cardline_zh: 武藏野的薄雾，笼住远山与孤舟。
items.cardline: Mist veils Musashi's hills and lonely boat.

items.title: Oedipus and the Sphinx
items.cardline_zh: 俄狄浦斯凝视谜团，命运的深渊在脚下。
items.cardline: Oedipus meets the riddle, fate beneath his feet.

items.title: A Knight of Alcántara or Calatrava
items.title_zh: 阿尔坎塔拉或卡拉特拉瓦骑士
items.cardline_zh: 骑士的目光，穿越战火与荣耀。
items.cardline: A knight's gaze through war and glory.

items.title: Jan (1438/41–1516), First Count of Egmond; Magdalena, Countess of Egmond (1464–1538)
items.title_zh: 扬（1438/41–1516），第一代埃格蒙特伯爵；玛格达莱娜，埃格蒙特伯爵夫人（1464–1538）
items.cardline_zh: 双人肖像，沉默中藏着家族的重量。
items.cardline: Two faces hold the weight of lineage.

items.title: Rough Waves
items.cardline_zh: 浪花翻涌，墨色中藏着海的咆哮。
items.cardline: Roaring waves captured in ink and gold.

items.title: The Abduction of the Sabine Women
items.cardline_zh: 劫掠的混乱中，灵魂在挣扎与呼喊。
items.cardline: Chaos of abduction, souls in desperate cry.

items.title: The Assumption of the Virgin
items.cardline_zh: 圣母升天，光芒与圣徒的仰望。
items.cardline: Virgin ascends in light, saints gaze upward.

items.title: The Presentation of Christ in the Temple
items.artist: Giovanni di Paolo (Giovanni di Paolo di Grazia)
items.cardline_zh: 圣殿中，烛光映照献祭的庄严。
items.cardline: Candlelight hallows the temple presentation.

items.title: The Holy Family with the Infant Saint John the Baptist
items.title_zh: 圣家族与幼年施洗者圣约翰
items.cardline_zh: 圣家族中，孩童的笑声回荡在神圣间。
items.cardline: Holy laughter echoes in a sacred family.

items.title: The Last Communion of Saint Jerome
items.cardline_zh: 临终的圣哲，最后的圣餐化作光芒。
items.cardline: Last communion glows in dying saint's grace.

items.title: The Penitent Magdalen
items.cardline_zh: 泪滴与忏悔，灵魂在黑暗中寻找光。
items.cardline: Tears and penance seek light in darkness.

items.title: Hanshan and Shide
items.cardline_zh: 寒山拾得，笑看人间纷扰。
items.cardline: Hanshan and Shide laugh at worldly strife.

items.title: Three Poetic Verses of Teaching by Ikkyū Given to His Disciples
items.title_zh: 一休宗纯示弟子诗偈三首
items.cardline_zh: 墨迹如禅，一字一句皆是教诲。
items.cardline: Ink strokes teach Zen in every verse.

items.title: Two Riders
items.cardline_zh: 双骑并辔，风尘仆仆的旅程。
items.cardline: Two riders journey through dust and wind.

items.title: An Old Man with a Dog
items.cardline_zh: 老人与狗，时光在皱纹中流淌。
items.cardline: Old man and dog, time etched in wrinkles.

items.title: The Baptism of Christ
items.cardline_zh: 约旦河边，圣灵如鸽子降下。
items.cardline: Dove descends as Jordan's waters bless.

items.title: The Calling of Saint Matthew
items.cardline_zh: 税吏的桌上，目光与召唤相遇。
items.cardline: At the tax table, a gaze meets the call.

items.title: Bhairavi Ragini: Folio from a ragamala series (Garland of Musical Modes)
items.title_zh: 拜拉维·拉吉尼：选自拉格马拉系列（音乐模式的花环）
items.cardline_zh: 拉格尼尼，旋律在色彩中流淌。
items.cardline: Ragini's melody flows through painted notes.

items.title: Etruscan Vase with Flowers
items.cardline_zh: 花瓶中，梦在幽暗中绽放
items.cardline: Dreams bloom in the vase's gloom.

items.title: The Holy Family
items.cardline_zh: 圣光轻抚，静谧如永恒
items.cardline: Holy light caresses, stillness eternal.

items.title: Friedrich III (1463–1525), the Wise, Elector of Saxony
items.artist: Lucas Cranach the Elder and Workshop
items.title_zh: 腓特烈三世（1463–1525），智者，萨克森选帝侯
items.cardline_zh: 权杖在手，目光如岁月沉深
items.cardline: Scepter held, gaze ancient as time.

items.title: Charles de Saint-Radegonde, called Charles Coguin, Abbot of Anchin
items.title_zh: 圣拉德贡德的查理，人称查理·科甘，安钦修道院院长
items.cardline_zh: 书卷与十字架，静默如信仰
items.cardline: Book and cross, silence of faith.

items.title: The Forest in Winter at Sunset
items.cardline_zh: 暮色浸染，林间余温未散
items.cardline: Twilight soaks the woods, warmth lingers.

items.title: The Burning of Sodom (formerly "The Destruction of Sodom")
items.title_zh: 所多玛的焚毁（原名“所多玛的毁灭”）
items.cardline_zh: 火光撕裂天幕，悲剧在灰烬中沉默
items.cardline: Flames tear the sky, tragedy in ashes.

items.title: The Nativity
items.cardline_zh: 暗夜中，圣婴是唯一的光
items.cardline: Night's sole light: the newborn king.

items.title: Herd Boy with Ox
items.cardline_zh: 牧童与牛，山色空蒙
items.cardline: Herd boy and ox, misty hills.

items.title: Saint Reparata Tortured with Red-Hot Irons
items.cardline_zh: 痛苦镀上金光，信仰不改
items.cardline: Pain gilded, faith unyielding.

items.title: Ink bamboo
items.cardline_zh: 墨色淡去，风骨犹存
items.cardline: Ink fades, but spirit endures.

items.title: Samson and Delilah
items.cardline_zh: 发丝缠绕，命运在剪下断裂
items.cardline: Hair entangles, fate cut short.

items.title: The Net Mender (Garnbinderen)
items.cardline_zh: 指尖穿梭，海风缝入网中
items.cardline: Fingers weave sea breeze into net.

items.title: Saint Philip Neri (1515–1595)
items.cardline_zh: 眼眸低垂，圣洁如初
items.cardline: Eyes cast down, purity untold.

items.title: The Martyrdom of Saint Lawrence; (reverse) Giving Drink to the Thirsty
items.artist: Master of the Acts of Mercy
items.title_zh: 圣劳伦斯殉道；（背面）给口渴者饮水
items.cardline_zh: 火焰之上，慈悲犹在
items.cardline: Above flames, mercy still shines.

items.title: Judith with the Head of Holofernes
items.title_zh: 朱迪斯与霍洛芬斯之首
items.cardline_zh: 利刃染血，胜利是无声的
items.cardline: Blade stained, victory silent.

items.title: Prayer in the Mosque
items.cardline_zh: 穹顶之下，虔诚如潮
items.cardline: Under dome, devotion like a tide.

items.title: The Choir of the Capuchin Church in Rome
items.title_zh: 罗马嘉布遣教堂的唱诗班
items.cardline_zh: 空椅静候，光从高处洒落
items.cardline: Empty seats wait, light descends.

items.title: Great Indian Fruit Bat
items.cardline_zh: 暗夜中，巨翼若梦
items.cardline: Vast wings in dark, a dream.

items.title: The Holy Family
items.cardline_zh: 圣婴安睡，世间静默
items.cardline: Holy infant sleeps, world quiet.

items.title: A River in a Meadow
items.cardline_zh: 溪水低语，草地轻吟
items.cardline: Stream whispers, meadow hums.

items.title: Christ Bearing the Cross
items.cardline_zh: 沉重的十字架下，每一步都刻着救赎的印记。
items.cardline: Each step carves redemption under the heavy cross.

items.title: Portrait of a Man (Sir Ralph Sadler?)
items.title_zh: 男子肖像（拉尔夫·萨德勒爵士？）
items.cardline_zh: 沉静的目光穿透岁月，诉说着权谋与智慧。
items.cardline: Eyes pierce time, whispering power and wisdom.

items.title: The Crucifixion
items.cardline_zh: 悲怆的天空下，十字架立成永恒的牺牲。
items.cardline: Beneath sorrowful sky, the cross stands eternal sacrifice.

items.title: Francesco d'Este (born ca. 1429, died after 1486)
items.title_zh: 弗朗切斯科·德斯特（约1429年生，1486年后卒）
items.cardline_zh: 年轻的面容藏不住贵族的孤傲与命运的重量。
items.cardline: Youthful face hides noble pride and fate's weight.

items.title: The Judgment of Paris
items.cardline_zh: 金苹果之争，美与诱惑在田园中交织。
items.cardline: Golden apple strife weaves beauty with temptation.

items.title: Madonna and Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣母怀抱圣婴，金光如慈爱般温暖。
items.cardline: Madonna holds child, gold warm as love.

items.title: Landscapes
items.cardline_zh: 墨色山水间，孤舟静泊，心随云远。
items.cardline: Ink mountains, lone boat, heart drifts with clouds.

items.title: Page from a Dispersed Bhagavata Purana Manuscript
items.cardline_zh: 神明起舞，蓝靛与朱砂绘出永恒的神话。
items.cardline: Gods dance in indigo and vermilion, myth eternal.

items.title: Ulrich Fugger the Younger (1490–1525)
items.cardline_zh: 金链与皮草，彰显着富商时代的荣耀。
items.cardline: Gold chain and fur, glory of merchant age.

items.title: Johann I (1468–1532), the Constant, Elector of Saxony
items.title_zh: 约翰一世（1468–1532），萨克森选侯，坚定的
items.cardline_zh: 威严的选帝侯，目光如铁，信仰如山。
items.cardline: Elector's iron gaze, faith steadfast as stone.

items.title: Virgin and Child with a Dragonfly
items.cardline_zh: 蜻蜓轻落，圣母与圣婴的宁静被自然触碰。
items.cardline: Dragonfly alights, touching Virgin and Child's peace.

items.title: Portrait of an Italian Woman
items.cardline_zh: 深色背景中，她的微笑藏着文艺复兴的秘密。
items.cardline: Her smile in dark holds Renaissance secrets.

items.title: Madonna and Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣子依偎，圣母的凝视如月光般温柔。
items.cardline: Child nestles, Madonna's gaze tender as moonlight.

items.title: Amida Manifesting in the Dharma-body of Expedient Means
items.title_zh: 阿弥陀佛显现方便法身
items.cardline_zh: 金光普照，阿弥陀佛以慈悲化身示现。
items.cardline: Golden light radiates, Amida manifests compassion.

items.title: Blind Orion Searching for the Rising Sun
items.title_zh: 盲人俄里翁寻找初升的太阳
items.cardline_zh: 巨人追寻朝阳，云海翻涌，大地初醒。
items.cardline: Giant seeks sun, clouds surge, earth awakens.

items.title: Saint Mary Magdalen Holding a Crucifix; (reverse) The Flagellation
items.title_zh: 圣抹大拉的玛利亚手持十字架；（背面）鞭笞
items.cardline_zh: 悔罪的泪水与鞭笞，换来灵魂的救赎。
items.cardline: Tears and scourge redeem the penitent soul.

items.title: Vanitas Still Life
items.cardline_zh: 骷髅与鲜花，虚空的寓言在静物中低语。
items.cardline: Skull and flowers whisper vanitas in still life.

items.title: Portrait of a Woman of the Slosgin Family of Cologne
items.title_zh: 科隆斯洛金家族女子肖像
items.cardline_zh: 丝绸与珍珠，她在静默中守望着家族荣光。
items.cardline: Silk and pearls, she guards family glory in silence.

items.title: Chinese poem on seeking a reclusive life in the mountains
items.cardline_zh: 山间隐逸，笔墨间流淌着超脱的诗意。
items.cardline: Mountain retreat, ink flows with transcendent verse.

items.title: Head of Christ (Ecce Homo)
items.cardline_zh: 荆棘冠下，基督的双眼凝视着人类的苦难。
items.cardline: Crowned with thorns, Christ's eyes behold human pain.

items.title: Cows Crossing a Ford
items.cardline_zh: 浅滩上，牛蹄溅起水花，牧人无声。
items.cardline: Hooves splash the ford, a silent herder follows.

items.title: Holy Family with an Angel
items.artist: Raffaellino del Garbo (also known as Raffaelle de' Capponi and Raffaelle de' Carli)
items.cardline_zh: 圣婴轻触天使，光从指间流淌。
items.cardline: Infant touches angel, light flows through fingers.

items.title: Portrait of a Woman
items.cardline_zh: 她的眼神穿透四百年，依然沉默。
items.cardline: Her gaze pierces four centuries, still silent.

items.title: The Harvesters
items.cardline_zh: 麦浪里，午后的疲惫与丰收相拥。
items.cardline: In wheat waves, afternoon fatigue meets harvest.

items.title: Virgin and Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣母低眉，圣婴的手轻触虚空。
items.cardline: Madonna's gaze down, child's hand touches void.

items.title: The God Indra Worships Ganesha, folio from the Tehri Garhwal series of the Gita Govinda
items.title_zh: 因陀罗神礼拜象头神，出自《牧童歌》泰赫里·加尔瓦尔系列
items.cardline_zh: 神象低首，乐音如甘露倾洒。
items.cardline: God-elephant bows, music pours like nectar.

items.title: Poem of Farewell to Liu Man
items.cardline_zh: 墨迹干涸，离愁却未消散。
items.cardline: Ink dries, but parting sorrow lingers.

items.title: Hermann von Wedigh III (died 1560)
items.title_zh: 赫尔曼·冯·韦迪希三世（1560年卒）
items.cardline_zh: 他的目光如铁，衣纹藏着帝国。
items.cardline: Eyes like iron, folds of cloth hold empire.

items.title: Archbishop Henjō (Sōjō Henjō zu), from the Dōon Version of the Thirty-Six Poetic Immortals
items.title_zh: 遍昭僧正像，出自《道音版三十六歌仙》
items.cardline_zh: 诗人回眸，墨香未散，歌已远。
items.cardline: Poet glances back, ink scent fades, song gone.

items.title: The Storm
items.cardline_zh: 骤雨中，他们奔跑，衣衫如旗。
items.cardline: In sudden rain, they run, garments like flags.

items.title: The Annunciation
items.cardline_zh: 天使的话语如光，刺破晨昏。
items.cardline: Angel's word like light, piercing dawn and dusk.

items.title: The Lamentation
items.cardline_zh: 哀悼者围成石环，泪凝成画。
items.cardline: Mourners in stone circle, tears frozen in paint.

items.title: Christ's Descent into Hell
items.cardline_zh: 黑暗裂开，基督踏入无声深渊。
items.cardline: Darkness splits, Christ steps into silent abyss.

items.title: The Servant Justified
items.cardline_zh: 仆人的辩解，如风中的蛛网。
items.cardline: Servant's excuse, like a cobweb in wind.

items.title: Saint Christopher and the Infant Christ
items.title_zh: 圣克里斯托弗与圣婴基督
items.cardline_zh: 圣徒涉水，肩上坐着整个救赎。
items.cardline: Saint wades, carrying redemption on his shoulder.

items.title: Man in Prayer
items.cardline_zh: 合十的手，比任何话语都沉重。
items.cardline: Clasped hands heavier than any word.

items.title: Dancers, Pink and Green
items.cardline_zh: 舞者转身，裙摆旋成粉绿的梦。
items.cardline: Dancer turns, skirt swirls a pink-green dream.

items.title: The Adoration of the Shepherds
items.cardline_zh: 牧羊人跪拜，牛槽里躺着星辰。
items.cardline: Shepherds kneel, a star lies in the manger.

items.title: The Jabach Family
items.cardline_zh: 家族凝视，时间在锦缎上凝固。
items.cardline: Family gaze, time frozen in brocade.

items.title: Self-Portrait
items.cardline_zh: 自画像里，他凝视着无人之境。
items.cardline: In self-portrait, he stares into no-man's land.

items.title: Saints Michael and Francis
items.cardline_zh: 圣光轻抚，双圣静立如永恒之柱。
items.cardline: Saints stand like eternal pillars in gentle light.

items.title: Saint John on Patmos, Madonna and Child Enthroned, and Death of the Virgin; The Crucifixion
items.title_zh: 拔摩岛的圣约翰、圣母子登基、圣母之死；耶稣受难
items.cardline_zh: 命运三重奏：启示、荣光与终章。
items.cardline: Three fates: revelation, glory, and final rest.

items.title: Bamboo in Snow
items.cardline_zh: 雪压竹枝低，清气满乾坤。
items.cardline: Snow bends bamboo; pure air fills the world.

items.title: Squirrel and Grape
items.cardline_zh: 松鼠攀藤，葡萄垂露，秋意轻颤。
items.cardline: Squirrel climbs vine, grapes drip dew, autumn shivers.

items.title: Saints Matthew and Francis
items.artist: Giovanni di Paolo (Giovanni di Paolo di Grazia)
items.cardline_zh: 圣徒与卷册，金色天光里低语。
items.cardline: Saints and scriptures whisper in golden light.

items.title: Olivier Journu (1724–1783)
items.cardline_zh: 蓝衣绅士，目光藏着远航的涛声。
items.cardline: Blue coat holds gaze of distant voyages.

items.title: Portrait of a Carthusian
items.cardline_zh: 幽独面容，映出永恒的修道院。
items.cardline: Solitary face reflects the eternal cloister.

items.title: Herdboys and Buffalos
items.cardline_zh: 牧童与牛，没入水墨烟雨。
items.cardline: Herdboys and buffalos dissolve in ink rain.

items.title: Poems on painting plum blossoms and bamboo
items.cardline_zh: 墨梅与竹，诗香凝于纸上。
items.cardline: Ink plum and bamboo: poetry crystallized on paper.

items.title: Christ Asleep during the Tempest
items.cardline_zh: 风暴中沉睡，安宁如磐石。
items.cardline: In tempest he sleeps, calm as a rock.

items.title: Map of the Grand Canal from Beijing to the Yangzi River
items.cardline_zh: 千里运河，缩于一卷青绿。
items.cardline: Thousand-li canal, rolled into blue-green scroll.

items.title: The Penitence of Saint Jerome
items.cardline_zh: 荒岩苦修，圣心向天。
items.cardline: Penance on wild rock, saintly heart ascends.

items.title: Christ Blessing
items.cardline_zh: 基督垂目，祝福如光漫溢。
items.cardline: Christ's downcast eyes overflow with blessing light.

items.title: The Cellier Altarpiece
items.cardline_zh: 圣坛圣像，金色帷幕后的低吟。
items.cardline: Altar saints murmur behind golden veils.

items.title: Virgin and Child in a Niche
items.cardline_zh: 圣母子立于壁龛，光如薄纱。
items.cardline: Virgin and Child in niche, light like gauze.

items.title: Virgin and Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣母抱婴，温柔如北方晨光。
items.cardline: Virgin and Child, tender as northern dawn.

items.title: Ten Verses on Oxherding
items.cardline_zh: 牧童寻牛，终见本心。
items.cardline: Oxherd seeks ox; at last finds his own heart.

items.title: Madonna and Child with Saints
items.cardline_zh: 圣众环绕，圣母如月中明珠。
items.cardline: Saints encircle Madonna, a luminous pearl in moon.

items.title: Satsubari, the Second of the Sixteen Arhats
items.title_zh: 十六罗汉之第二尊——萨多波利
items.cardline_zh: 胡僧静坐，目光穿越千山。
items.cardline: Arhat sits still, gaze piercing a thousand peaks.

items.title: Salome
items.cardline_zh: 莎乐美之舞，血色与金辉交织。
items.cardline: Salome's dance weaves blood and golden glow.

items.title: Ferdinand VII (1784–1833), When Prince of Asturias
items.title_zh: 费迪南德七世（1784–1833），阿斯图里亚斯亲王时期
items.cardline_zh: 青涩王储眉宇间，已藏风暴
items.cardline: Youthful prince, a storm already in his brow.

items.title: Gray Weather, Grande Jatte
items.cardline_zh: 灰调下，光点静待春的呼吸
items.cardline: Gray sky holds the promise of spring.

items.title: The Kangxi Emperor's Southern Inspection Tour, Scroll Three: Ji'nan to Mount Tai
items.title_zh: 康熙南巡图，第三卷：济南至泰山
items.cardline_zh: 山河入卷，龙舟破浪千秋影
items.cardline: Mountains roll, the dragon boat cuts waves.

items.title: The Crucifixion; The Last Judgment
items.cardline_zh: 天堂地狱间，羔羊望穿永恒
items.cardline: Between heaven and hell, the lamb sees eternity.

items.title: Portrait of a "Mamelouk"
items.cardline_zh: 异域铁甲下，少年目光如刀
items.cardline: Steel and silk, a boy's gaze cuts sharp.

items.title: Famous Women
items.cardline_zh: 美人如花，墨香深处听叹息
items.cardline: Beauty blooms, ink whispers her sorrow.

items.title: Virgin and Child in an Apse
items.cardline_zh: 圣母怀中，光与影温柔交汇
items.cardline: In her arms, light and shadow gently meet.

items.title: Petrus Scriverius (1576–1660)
items.title_zh: 彼得鲁斯·斯克里维里乌斯（1576–1660）
items.cardline_zh: 学者笔下，历史在纸上低语
items.cardline: A scholar's hand, history murmurs on paper.

items.title: Ten Rakan Examining a Painting of White-Robed Kannon
items.cardline_zh: 罗汉观画，白袍观音入定中
items.cardline: Arhats gaze, the white-robed one sits still.

items.title: Handscroll of Ten Homoerotic (Nanshoku) Scenes
items.cardline_zh: 春宫卷里，情愫如烟轻轻绕
items.cardline: In scrolls, love lingers like morning mist.

items.title: Pope Clement X (1590–1676)
items.cardline_zh: 教皇红袍下，权杖与灵魂共沉
items.cardline: Red robe and staff, a soul weighed by power.

items.title: Tsujigahana Textile with Horizontal Stripes, Flowering Plants, Fans, Snowflakes, Clouds, and Bellflowers
items.title_zh: 辻花染织物，横条纹、花草、扇子、雪花、云彩与桔梗纹
items.cardline_zh: 织锦流光，花与雪共舞千年
items.cardline: Silk weaves flowers and snow in timeless dance.

items.title: Flora and Zephyr
items.cardline_zh: 花神轻吻，风起时爱意蔓延
items.cardline: Zephyr's kiss, Flora blooms in the breeze.

items.title: Manuscript Leaf with the Last Judgment, from a Book of Hours
items.cardline_zh: 末日审判，灵魂在金色中颤抖
items.cardline: Last judgment, souls tremble in golden light.

items.title: A State Yacht and Other Craft in Calm Water
items.title_zh: 御舟及其他船只静泊图
items.cardline_zh: 静水之上，帆影如云自逍遥
items.cardline: Calm waters, sails drift like clouds at ease.

items.title: The Good Samaritan
items.cardline_zh: 善者俯身，伤口处生出慈悲
items.cardline: The good stoops, mercy rises from a wound.

items.title: Garden of the Inept Administrator
items.cardline_zh: 拙政园里，山石静读流水声
items.cardline: Garden stones listen to the stream's quiet song.

items.title: A Woman Ironing
items.cardline_zh: 熨斗下，褶皱藏着日常诗意
items.cardline: Iron glides, ordinary grace in every fold.

items.title: View of Toledo
items.cardline_zh: 托雷多城，云与山在绿光中燃烧
items.cardline: Toledo burns in green light, cloud and hill.

items.title: Section of the Dream Diary (Yume no ki)
items.cardline_zh: 梦记残片，墨迹中浮起寒山
items.cardline: Dream fragments, cold mountains rise in ink.

items.title: Arabs Crossing a Ford
items.cardline_zh: 涉水剪影，暮色柔化所有棱角。
items.cardline: Silhouettes cross, dusk softens every edge.

items.title: A Peasant Family
items.cardline_zh: 烛火轻摇，照亮沉默的相依。
items.cardline: Candlelight flickers, lighting silent togetherness.

items.title: The Nativity
items.cardline_zh: 金辉倾泻，圣婴安睡于尘世。
items.cardline: Golden light pours; the holy child sleeps in mortal hay.

items.title: Our Lady of Valvanera
items.cardline_zh: 圣母低眉，众星如泪坠落。
items.cardline: Madonna bows; stars fall like tears.

items.title: The Lamentation
items.artist: Master of the Virgin among Virgins
items.cardline_zh: 群手垂落，哀伤凝成赤金。
items.cardline: Hands fall; grief solidifies into gold.

items.title: Lady Rich (Elizabeth Jenks, died 1558)
items.title_zh: 里奇夫人（伊丽莎白·詹克斯，卒于1558年）
items.cardline_zh: 珠光黯淡，一瞬定格成永恒。
items.cardline: Pearls dim; a moment frozen into eternity.

items.title: The Horse Fair
items.cardline_zh: 骏马奔腾，尘土扬起生命的狂澜。
items.cardline: Horses surge; dust churns the frenzy of life.

items.title: Jacob Willemsz van Veen (1456–1535), the Artist's Father
items.title_zh: 雅各布·威廉姆斯·范·维恩（1456–1535），画家的父亲
items.cardline_zh: 岁月雕刻，目光穿透时光。
items.cardline: Time chisels; eyes pierce through ages.

items.title: The Musicians
items.cardline_zh: 乐声未起，少年已沉醉于忧伤。
items.cardline: Music yet unborn; youth already drunk with melancholy.

items.title: Landscapes, Figures, and Flowers
items.cardline_zh: 山水不语，花鸟自成天地。
items.cardline: Mountains silent; flowers and birds create their own world.

items.title: A Woman Seated beside a Vase of Flowers (Madame Paul Valpinçon?)
items.title_zh: 坐在花瓶旁的女子（保罗·瓦尔平松夫人？）
items.cardline_zh: 花影斜倚，静默胜过千言。
items.cardline: Flowers lean; silence speaks more than words.

items.title: Young Lady in 1866
items.cardline_zh: 黑裙如夜，眼神却燃起火苗。
items.cardline: Black gown like night; her eyes kindle a flame.

items.title: The Immaculate Conception
items.cardline_zh: 天光环绕，无瑕如初雪降尘。
items.cardline: Heavenly light encircles; pure as first snow on earth.

items.title: Portrait of Alvise Contarini(?); (verso) A Tethered Roebuck
items.title_zh: 阿尔维斯·康塔里尼肖像（？）；（背面）拴着的雄獐
items.cardline_zh: 正面端庄，背面小鹿轻跃。
items.cardline: Front solemn; a roebuck leaps on the reverse.

items.title: George Sand's Garden at Nohant
items.cardline_zh: 绿荫如瀑，繁花在笔尖喧闹。
items.cardline: Green shade cascades; blossoms riot at the brush tip.

items.title: Saint John the Baptist Bearing Witness
items.cardline_zh: 指尖指向旷野，话语化为风。
items.cardline: Finger points to the wild; words dissolve into wind.

items.title: The Classic of Filial Piety
items.cardline_zh: 墨线游走，孝义隐于山水间。
items.cardline: Ink lines wander; filial piety hides in misty hills.

items.title: Major Thomas Pechell (1753–1826)
items.cardline_zh: 戎装笔挺，眼底却藏远方。
items.cardline: Uniform crisp; yet his eyes hold distant shores.

items.title: Half of a Prayer Bead with the Lamentation
items.cardline_zh: 微雕之中，哀恸却浩大如海。
items.cardline: In tiny carve, grief vast as ocean.

items.title: Madonna and Child
items.cardline_zh: 金底之上，圣母轻拥永恒。
items.cardline: On gold ground, Madonna holds eternity.

items.title: Mantras of the Two Realms in Sanskrit Script
items.cardline_zh: 梵音如丝，缠绕虚空
items.cardline: Sanskrit threads weave through silent air.

items.title: Gabriel Manigault
items.cardline_zh: 目光沉静，仿佛时间凝固
items.cardline: Eyes hold still—time’s quiet weight.

items.title: The Chess Players
items.cardline_zh: 棋局如人生，步步皆为幻
items.cardline: Each move a dream upon the board.

items.title: Erasmus of Rotterdam
items.cardline_zh: 笔尖下的思想，静谧如光
items.cardline: Thoughts carved in shadow and light.

items.title: Portrait of a Woman
items.artist: Italian (Florentine) Painter (possibly Jacopo Zucchi, Florence 1541–1590 Rome)
items.cardline_zh: 侧影里藏着半个世纪的秘密
items.cardline: Half a century in a turned cheek.

items.title: Flowers in a Grotesque Vase
items.cardline_zh: 花朵在奇诡之瓶中低语
items.cardline: Blooms whisper from a curious vase.

items.title: Portrait of a Woman, Possibly a Nun of San Secondo; (verso) Scene in Grisaille
items.title_zh: 女子肖像，可能是圣塞贡多的修女；（背面）灰色单色场景
items.cardline_zh: 面容与灰影，两面皆是虔诚
items.cardline: Face and shadow—both hold prayer.

items.title: Miscellaneous Studies
items.cardline_zh: 笔随意动，万物皆成墨痕
items.cardline: Brush follows mind—worlds in ink.

items.title: Retable with Scenes from the Life of Saint Andrew
items.title_zh: 圣安德烈生平场景祭坛画
items.cardline_zh: 圣者的碎片，拼出永恒之光
items.cardline: Shattered saint—eternal light pieced.

items.title: A Donor Presented by a Saint
items.title_zh: 由一位圣人引荐的捐赠者
items.cardline_zh: 圣者引路，凡人低头祈愿
items.cardline: A saint leads; a mortal prays.

items.title: The Collector of Prints
items.cardline_zh: 他收集的不是画，是时光
items.cardline: He collects not prints but moments.

items.title: Boys in a Dory
items.cardline_zh: 海浪之上，少年是自由的
items.cardline: Boys and boat—freedom on waves.

items.title: The Rest on the Flight into Egypt
items.cardline_zh: 逃亡途中，圣光轻抚大地
items.cardline: Holy light touches fleeing earth.

items.title: The Adoration of the Magi
items.cardline_zh: 黄金与乳香，献于初生之光
items.cardline: Gold and myrrh for newborn light.

items.title: Arcadia
items.cardline_zh: 笛声悠扬，牧歌里的永恒
items.cardline: Pipe song—eternity in a flute.

items.title: The Flight into Egypt
items.cardline_zh: 夜色中，圣家悄然前行
items.cardline: Holy family moves through night's veil.

items.title: Carp and Waterweeds
items.cardline_zh: 水草间，锦鲤游成一首诗
items.cardline: Carp swim through weeds—a living poem.

items.title: Woman Playing a Guitar
items.cardline_zh: 琴弦轻颤，夜色为她低吟
items.cardline: Strings tremble—night sings for her.

items.title: Don Gaspar de Guzmán (1587–1645), Count-Duke of Olivares
items.title_zh: 唐·加斯帕尔·德·古斯曼（1587–1645），奥利瓦雷斯伯爵-公爵
items.cardline_zh: 权杖与阴影，皆是过眼云烟
items.cardline: Scepter and shadow—both fleeting.

items.title: Night-Shining White
items.cardline_zh: 骏马嘶鸣，月光下的精灵
items.cardline: Horse neighs—a spirit under moon.

items.title: Song of the Stone Drums
items.cardline_zh: 石鼓沉音，千年不语
items.cardline: Echoes of stone drums, silent for ages.

items.title: Portrait of a Man
items.cardline_zh: 凝视处，灵魂微明
items.cardline: Gaze that holds a faint light of soul.

items.title: The Annunciation
items.cardline_zh: 光降无声，羽翼凝息
items.cardline: Light descends in silence, wings hold breath.

items.title: Saint Agnes (one of a pair)
items.cardline_zh: 羔羊温驯，棕榈常青
items.cardline: Lamb gentle, palm ever green.

items.title: Painting the Eyes on a Snow Rabbit
items.cardline_zh: 雪兔点睛，春意初萌
items.cardline: Snow rabbit's eyes painted, spring stirs.

items.title: Mary of Burgundy
items.cardline_zh: 金冠微垂，书卷暗香
items.cardline: Crown slightly bowed, books breathe fragrance.

items.title: Scene from a Novella
items.cardline_zh: 檐下私语，情愫暗生
items.cardline: Whispers beneath eaves, affections bloom unseen.

items.title: Scholar on a rock
items.cardline_zh: 孤石独坐，万卷藏胸
items.cardline: Alone on rock, worlds within.

items.title: Bashi-Bazouk
items.cardline_zh: 异域之眼，光华灼灼
items.cardline: Exotic eyes, burning bright.

items.title: Laila and Majnun
items.cardline_zh: 荒漠情深，月照双影
items.cardline: Desert deep, moonlit shadows of two.

items.title: Penelope
items.cardline_zh: 织机空转，归期渺茫
items.cardline: Loom still, waiting endless.

items.title: Saints Bartholomew and Simon
items.cardline_zh: 圣徒持刃，恒守信仰
items.cardline: Saints bear knives, faith eternal.

items.title: Madame Philippe Panon Desbassayns de Richemont (Jeanne Eglé Mourgue, 1778–1855) and Her Son, Eugène (1800–1859)
items.title_zh: 菲利普·帕农·德巴桑斯·德·里什蒙夫人（让娜·埃格勒·穆尔格，1778–1855）及其子欧仁（1800–1859）
items.cardline_zh: 慈母膝上，温情如蜜
items.cardline: Mother's lap, honeyed warmth.

items.title: Madonna and Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣母低眉，圣婴含笑
items.cardline: Madonna bends, infant smiles.

items.title: Fisherman's Lodge At Mount Xisai
items.cardline_zh: 西塞山前，独钓寒江
items.cardline: Mount Xisai, solitary angler in cold river.

items.title: Still Life with a Vase of Flowers, Melon, Peaches, and Grapes
items.artist: Charlotte Eustache Sophie de Fuligny Damas, marquise de Grollier
items.title_zh: 花瓶花卉、甜瓜、桃与葡萄静物
items.cardline_zh: 花果静好，时光凝香
items.cardline: Fruits and flowers, time holds fragrance.

items.title: Jalais Hill, Pontoise
items.cardline_zh: 山丘之上，风拂翠色
items.cardline: Hills awake, wind combs green.

items.title: The Penitent Magdalen
items.cardline_zh: 烛火微光，泪洗铅华
items.cardline: Candlelight, tears wash away world.

items.title: Heroic Landscape with Rainbow
items.cardline_zh: 虹跨天际，山河壮丽
items.cardline: Rainbow arches over majestic land.

items.title: Crucifix
items.cardline_zh: 十架之上，血染苍穹
items.cardline: Cross stains sky with blood.

items.title: White Plum Blossoms and Moon
items.cardline_zh: 月下寒枝，暗香浮动
items.cardline: Moonlit branches, fragrance stirred by night

items.title: Melancholy Courtesan
items.cardline_zh: 眉间愁绪，春色难掩
items.cardline: Brow heavy with spring's unspoken sorrow

items.title: Diana and Cupid
items.cardline_zh: 爱神垂眸，箭已离弦
items.cardline: Cupid's arrow loosed, Diana's gaze averted

items.title: Portrait of a Man
items.cardline_zh: 岁月刻痕，眼底藏锋
items.cardline: Time etched in furrows, a blade in the eye

items.title: Self-Portrait with Two Pupils, Marie Gabrielle Capet (1761–1818) and Marie Marguerite Carraux de Rosemond (1765–1788)
items.title_zh: 自画像与两位学生：玛丽·加布里埃尔·卡佩（1761–1818）和玛丽·玛格丽特·卡罗·德·罗斯蒙德（1765–1788）
items.cardline_zh: 画室凝望，薪火相传
items.cardline: Gaze meets gaze across the studio air

items.title: Ia Orana Maria (Hail Mary)
items.cardline_zh: 南岛圣音，花间低语
items.cardline: Tropical prayer blooms beneath the palm

items.title: Hortensia
items.cardline_zh: 蓝花静开，幽梦无痕
items.cardline: Blue hydrangea, a dream without trace

items.title: Christ Blessing the Children
items.artist: Lucas Cranach the Younger and Workshop
items.cardline_zh: 基督垂手，孩童拥前
items.cardline: Children press close, blessing descends

items.title: The Adoration of the Magi
items.cardline_zh: 东方星引，三王俯拜
items.cardline: Star-led kings kneel in timeless awe

items.title: The Coronation of the Virgin
items.cardline_zh: 天穹加冕，圣光环绕
items.cardline: Heaven's crown descends in radiant rings

items.title: Male Nude
items.cardline_zh: 裸身而立，明暗交辉
items.cardline: Naked form, light and shadow converse

items.title: Dancers Practicing at the Barre
items.cardline_zh: 把杆之间，舞影凝固
items.cardline: Barre holds still the dancer's poised grace

items.title: The Mystic Marriage of Saint Catherine of Siena
items.artist: Giovanni di Paolo (Giovanni di Paolo di Grazia)
items.title_zh: 锡耶纳的圣凯瑟琳的神秘婚姻
items.cardline_zh: 圣女受戒，神光交融
items.cardline: Mystic ring unites saint and divine

items.title: The Banishment of Hagar
items.cardline_zh: 荒漠转身，母子孤影
items.cardline: Desert turns, mother and child alone

items.title: A Boy with a Cat—Morning
items.cardline_zh: 晨光入户，猫戏童颜
items.cardline: Morning light and cat play on a boy

items.title: Pheasants among Trees: Flowers of the Four Seasons
items.cardline_zh: 雉隐花丛，四时流转
items.cardline: Pheasants hide in flowers of all seasons

items.title: Pope Benedict XIV (Prospero Lambertini, 1675–1758)
items.title_zh: 教皇本笃十四世（普罗斯佩罗·兰贝蒂尼，1675–1758）
items.cardline_zh: 教皇端坐，慧眼如炬
items.cardline: Pope's wise eyes hold centuries of thought

items.title: Cassone with painted front panel depicting the Conquest of Trebizond
items.title_zh: 卡松柜，彩绘前板描绘征服特拉布宗
items.cardline_zh: 凯旋入画，箱藏战史
items.cardline: Victory painted on a wedding chest

items.title: Fish Market
items.cardline_zh: 鱼市喧腾，鲜味满溢
items.cardline: Fish market's clamor, the sea's fresh bounty

items.title: Oxherding
items.cardline_zh: 牧童无影，牛亦忘归
items.cardline: No herder, no ox, only the lost path

items.title: Drawings and Poems by Various Artists
items.title_zh: 多位艺术家的素描与诗歌
items.cardline_zh: 笔尖游走诗与画，墨痕未干人已远。
items.cardline: Brush dances between verse and ink, leaving traces of distant souls.

items.title: Portrait of a Boy
items.cardline_zh: 稚气未脱的眼神里，藏着整个世纪的秘密。
items.cardline: A child's gaze holds secrets of an age.

items.title: Saint Reparata before the Emperor Decius
items.title_zh: 圣雷帕拉塔在德西乌斯皇帝面前
items.cardline_zh: 金箔裂开处，圣光与刀锋相遇。
items.cardline: Gold cracks where light meets blade.

items.title: Two Poems from the Collection of Ancient and Modern Poems (Kokin wakashū)
items.cardline_zh: 墨色在纸上呼吸，诗句便活了过来。
items.cardline: Ink breathes on paper, verses come alive.

items.title: Virgin and Child with Saint Anne
items.cardline_zh: 祖母的膝上，时间折叠成温柔的褶皱。
items.cardline: Time folds in gentle folds on a grandmother's lap.

items.title: The Twelve Apostles: Saints Bartholomew, Andrew, Matthew, James the Greater, Thaddeus, Philip, James the Lesser, Simon, Peter, Paul, Thomas, and John
items.title_zh: 十二使徒：圣巴多罗买、安德烈、马太、大雅各、达太、腓力、小雅各、西门、彼得、保罗、多马和约翰
items.cardline_zh: 十二道目光穿透画框，追问永恒。
items.cardline: Twelve gazes pierce the frame, questioning eternity.

items.title: Boating
items.cardline_zh: 水纹与船影，在笔触间轻轻摇晃。
items.cardline: Ripples and shadows sway between brushstrokes.

items.title: Saint Rosalie Interceding for the Plague-stricken of Palermo
items.title_zh: 圣罗莎莉为巴勒莫瘟疫灾民代祷
items.cardline_zh: 瘟疫中的双手，托起一缕圣光。
items.cardline: Hands in plague lift a thread of holy light.

items.title: Courtesan as Daruma
items.cardline_zh: 华服之下，禅意与红尘缠作一团。
items.cardline: Silk hides Zen; dust and grace entwined.

items.title: The Old Italian Woman
items.cardline_zh: 皱纹里藏着一座城，沉默而苍老。
items.cardline: A city sleeps in lines of a weathered face.

items.title: Portrait of a thin-faced, bearded man
items.cardline_zh: 薄面之下，千年前的呼吸未散。
items.cardline: A thin face still breathes from ancient Rome.

items.title: The Apotheosis of the Spanish Monarchy
items.cardline_zh: 云端的王座，不过是浮华的倒影。
items.cardline: Thrones in clouds mirror a fleeting glory.

items.title: Madonna Adoring the Child
items.cardline_zh: 圣母低眉时，圣婴的笑惊醒了时间。
items.cardline: Mary's bowed head; the Child's laugh breaks time.

items.title: Madonna and Child
items.artist: Luca Signorelli (Luca d'Egidio di Luca di Ventura)
items.cardline_zh: 圆润的线条里，母爱凝成永恒。
items.cardline: Soft curves mold a mother's eternal love.

items.title: Joseph Interpreting the Dreams of Pharaoh
items.cardline_zh: 梦的碎片，在法老眼前拼成未来。
items.cardline: Dream fragments piece a future for the pharaoh.

items.title: Tanuki (Racoon  Dog) Viewing Its Reflection in Water
items.cardline_zh: 水中幻影，是另一个世界的自己。
items.cardline: Reflection in water: another self in another world.

items.title: The Englishman (William Tom Warrener, 1861–1934) at the Moulin Rouge
items.title_zh: 红磨坊的英国人（威廉·汤姆·沃伦纳，1861–1934）
items.cardline_zh: 红磨坊的灯火，照亮一个异乡人的侧影。
items.cardline: Moulin Rouge lights trace a stranger's silhouette.

items.title: The Adoration of the Magi
items.cardline_zh: 马槽前的跪拜，让星辰失去了光芒。
items.cardline: Kneeling before the manger dims the stars.

items.title: The Musician
items.cardline_zh: 琴弦未动，乐声已从指间溢出。
items.cardline: Strings untouched, music spills from fingertips.

items.title: Landscapes
items.cardline_zh: 山与水在纸上相逢，从此不再分离。
items.cardline: Mountains and waters meet on paper, never to part.

items.title: Saint Catherine of Alexandria
items.cardline_zh: 圣光穿透书页，智慧在指尖凝结成永恒的静默
items.cardline: Light pierces scripture, wisdom frozen in timeless silence

items.title: Clothing the Naked
items.cardline_zh: 衣袍垂落如慈悲，赤裸的灵魂在布匹间重获尊严
items.cardline: Garments fall like mercy, dignity reborn in cloth

items.title: Imaginary Landscape with the Palatine Hill from Campo Vaccino
items.title_zh: 从坎波瓦奇诺眺望帕拉蒂尼山的想象风景
items.cardline_zh: 废墟之上，牧歌轻扬，古罗马的梦境沉入粉蓝暮色
items.cardline: Pastoral whispers over ruins, Rome's dream in twilight blue

items.title: Eighteen Songs of a Nomad Flute: The Story of Lady Wenji
items.cardline_zh: 长路如弦，马蹄踏碎山河，笛声卷起塞外风沙
items.cardline: Road like a string, hooves shatter lands, flute stirs desert winds

items.title: Mountain and Calligraphy
items.cardline_zh: 墨色呼吸间，山峦与文字共生一片空寂
items.cardline: Ink breathes, mountains and words share one vast silence

items.title: The Flagellation; (reverse) The Madonna of Mercy
items.title_zh: 鞭笞基督；（背面）慈悲圣母
items.cardline_zh: 鞭影下血色沉寂，翻转时慈悲如月笼罩众生
items.cardline: Blood stills under the lash, mercy veils the other side

items.title: Portrait of a Man in Armor with Two Pages
items.title_zh: 穿盔甲的男子与两名侍从肖像
items.cardline_zh: 铠甲冰冷，少年的目光却比剑锋更锐利
items.cardline: Cold armor, yet the boy's gaze cuts sharper than steel

items.title: Cephalus and Procris
items.title_zh: 刻法罗斯与普罗克里斯
items.cardline_zh: 猎犬嗅到背叛的气息，爱情在暗影中锈蚀
items.cardline: Hounds scent betrayal, love corrodes in the shadows

items.title: Lingering Rain over Half the Village
items.cardline_zh: 雨线垂钓寂静，半村浮在墨色的呼吸里
items.cardline: Rain lines fish for silence, half village floats in ink

items.title: The Story of Joseph
items.cardline_zh: 兄弟的泪水在谷仓里发酵成黄金，命运流转如环
items.cardline: Brothers' tears ferment to gold in the granary, fate turns full circle

items.title: A Woman Reading
items.cardline_zh: 书页静默，目光沉入字句的深海
items.cardline: Pages still, eyes sink into the deep sea of words

items.title: Graziella
items.cardline_zh: 那不勒斯的少女，凝成一滴琥珀色的叹息
items.cardline: Neapolitan girl, frozen in an amber sigh

items.title: Christ Blessing, Surrounded by a Donor Family
items.title_zh: 基督赐福，周围是捐赠者一家
items.cardline_zh: 全家跪拜于光中，基督的祝福如雨水洒向尘世
items.cardline: Family kneels in light, Christ's blessing rains upon the world

items.title: Carlo Rimbotti (1518–1591)
items.cardline_zh: 目光穿过画框，时间的皱褶里藏着一场未完成的对话
items.cardline: Gaze passes the frame, time's folds hold an unfinished dialogue

items.title: A Deerhound
items.cardline_zh: 猎犬的鼻尖颤动着晨露，忠诚凝成青铜般的静立
items.cardline: Hound's nose trembles with dew, loyalty cast in bronze stillness

items.title: An Artist Painting a Heraldic Shield in a Cabinet of Curiosities
items.title_zh: 在珍奇柜中绘制纹章盾牌的艺术家
items.cardline_zh: 画笔与盾牌对视，奇珍在暗室中窃窃私语
items.cardline: Brush meets shield, curiosities whisper in the dark room

items.title: The Nativity with Donors and Saints Jerome and Leonard
items.title_zh: 耶稣诞生与捐赠者及圣杰罗姆、圣伦纳德
items.cardline_zh: 圣婴的微光点亮牧笛，捐赠者在阴影里合掌如石
items.cardline: Infant's glow lights the shepherd's pipe, donors pray in stone

items.title: Fishing Boat on Reed Covered Bank and Calligraphy
items.title_zh: 芦苇岸边的渔船与书法
items.cardline_zh: 渔舟轻泊芦苇岸，墨迹与波纹共写一首无字诗
items.cardline: Boat rests by reeds, ink and ripples write a wordless poem

items.title: Madame Cézanne (Hortense Fiquet, 1850–1922) in the Conservatory
items.title_zh: 塞尚夫人（奥坦斯·菲凯，1850–1922）在温室中
items.cardline_zh: 衣饰的褶皱里藏着永恒的沉默，目光穿透温室玻璃
items.cardline: Silence hides in dress folds, gaze pierces the conservatory glass

items.title: The Triumph of Mordecai
items.cardline_zh: 号角震落王冠，胜利的队列踏过紫袍与尘埃
items.cardline: Trumpets shatter crowns, triumph marches through purple and dust

items.title: The Rest on the Flight into Egypt
items.cardline_zh: 树影轻摇，圣家族于暮色中小憩
items.cardline: Shadows cradle the Holy Family in twilight peace

items.title: Four Gospels in Armenian
items.cardline_zh: 金箔经文，沉默如星辰排列
items.cardline: Gold script glows like constellations in silence

items.title: Head of Saint John the Baptist on a Charger
items.cardline_zh: 盘中头颅，目光仍刺穿虚空
items.cardline: Severed gaze still pierces the void

items.title: Saint Remigius Replenishing the Barrel of Wine; (interior) Saint Remigius and the Burning Wheat
items.title_zh: 圣雷米吉乌斯添满酒桶；（内部）圣雷米吉乌斯与燃烧的麦子
items.cardline_zh: 圣人指尖，酒与火皆成圣迹
items.cardline: Saints fingers turn wine to miracle, fire to grace

items.title: Mrs. Gabriel Manigault
items.title_zh: 加布里埃尔·马尼戈夫人
items.cardline_zh: 绸缎低语，时光凝于侧影
items.cardline: Silk whispers, time frozen in profile

items.title: Portrait of a Woman with a Man at a Casement
items.cardline_zh: 窗畔凝望，爱意悬于明暗之间
items.cardline: Love lingers in the casement's light and shadow

items.title: A Miracle of Saint Joseph of Cupertino (1603–1663)
items.title_zh: 圣若瑟·库比蒂诺（1603–1663）的奇迹
items.cardline_zh: 圣人腾空，凡尘仰望成云
items.cardline: Saint levitates, earthbound eyes become clouds

items.title: Holy Family with Saint Anne
items.cardline_zh: 圣安娜膝上，时光轻柔折叠
items.cardline: Time folds gently on Saint Anne's lap

items.title: Saint Anthony the Abbot in the Wilderness
items.title_zh: 荒野中的圣安东尼院长
items.cardline_zh: 荒野独行，圣徒与影为伴
items.cardline: Alone in the wild, saint walks with his shadow

items.title: The Siesta
items.cardline_zh: 热带午后，色彩昏然入梦
items.cardline: Tropical noon dissolves into drowsy hues

items.title: Saint John on Patmos
items.cardline_zh: 孤岛之上，圣约翰听见天启
items.cardline: On the lone isle, John hears divine thunder

items.title: Madame Edmond Cavé (Marie-Elisabeth Blavot, ca. 1806–1883)
items.title_zh: 埃德蒙·卡维夫人（玛丽-伊丽莎白·布拉沃，约1806–1883）
items.cardline_zh: 绸裙静默，眼神藏着未言之语
items.cardline: Silk dress still, eyes hold unspoken tales

items.title: The Glorification of the Barbaro Family
items.cardline_zh: 云中家族，荣耀如光倾泻
items.cardline: Family floats on clouds, glory pours like light

items.title: Saint Andrew
items.cardline_zh: 圣安德烈，十字架已成永恒
items.cardline: Saint Andrew's cross becomes eternal flame

items.title: The Crucifixion with Saints and a Donor
items.title_zh: 圣徒与捐赠者相伴的受难图
items.cardline_zh: 十字架下，众生泪如雨注
items.cardline: Beneath the cross, tears rain from all eyes

items.title: Portrait of a Young Man
items.artist: Cosmè Tura (Cosimo di Domenico di Bonaventura)
items.cardline_zh: 青年侧首，目光望向远方
items.cardline: Young man turns, gaze lost beyond the frame

items.title: Mandala of the Bodhisattva Hannya (Prajnaparamita)
items.cardline_zh: 曼荼罗中，智慧如莲绽放
items.cardline: Mandala blooms, wisdom unfolds like lotus

items.title: A Vase with Flowers
items.cardline_zh: 花束中，时光凝固成露
items.cardline: In the vase, time crystallizes as dew

items.title: Madonna and Child Enthroned with Saints
items.cardline_zh: 圣母子居中，圣徒静立如林
items.cardline: Madonna and Child central, saints still as trees

items.title: Portrait of an Old Man
items.cardline_zh: 老人眼中，一生沉静如海
items.cardline: Old man's eyes hold a lifetime, calm as sea

items.title: Courtesan Reading a Letter
items.cardline_zh: 低垂的眼帘，字里行间藏着谁的叹息
items.cardline: Downcast eyes trace unspoken words between lines

items.title: Cypresses
items.cardline_zh: 火焰般的笔触把天空也点燃
items.cardline: Flame-like strokes set the sky ablaze

items.title: The Adoration of the Magi
items.cardline_zh: 俗世与神圣在金色中交织
items.cardline: Mundane and divine interwoven in gold

items.title: Virgin and Child
items.cardline_zh: 柔光轻抚圣婴无邪的脸庞
items.cardline: Soft light caresses the infant's innocent face

items.title: Christ Presented to the People
items.cardline_zh: 人群中他静默承受所有目光
items.cardline: Silent amidst the crowd bearing every gaze

items.title: The Fifteen Mysteries and the Virgin of the Rosary
items.cardline_zh: 念珠串起十五段静默光阴
items.cardline: Rosary beads string fifteen silent moments

items.title: Saint Romuald
items.cardline_zh: 苦修者的孤独在金色背影里
items.cardline: Ascetic solitude in a golden silhouette

items.title: Saints Peter and John Healing the Lame Man
items.title_zh: 圣彼得和圣约翰医治瘸腿者
items.cardline_zh: 神迹在凡人指尖闪现
items.cardline: Miracle flickers at mortal fingertips

items.title: Tiger in Repose
items.cardline_zh: 沉睡的肌肉下藏着雷霆
items.cardline: Thunder sleeps beneath the resting muscle

items.title: Winter landscape with fisherman
items.cardline_zh: 孤舟独钓一江寒雪
items.cardline: One boat angles alone in the frozen stream

items.title: Madame Cézanne (Hortense Fiquet, 1850–1922) in a Red Dress
items.title_zh: 塞尚夫人（奥坦丝·菲凯，1850–1922）身着红裙
items.cardline_zh: 红裙凝固成时间里的静物
items.cardline: Red dress frozen as a still life in time

items.title: Antoine Laurent Lavoisier (1743–1794) and Marie Anne Lavoisier (Marie Anne Pierrette Paulze, 1758–1836)
items.title_zh: 安托万·拉瓦锡（1743–1794）与玛丽·安娜·拉瓦锡（玛丽·安娜·皮埃雷特·波尔兹，1758–1836）
items.cardline_zh: 双人肖像里科学凝视着永恒
items.cardline: Science gazes at eternity in paired portrait

items.title: The Holy Family
items.cardline_zh: 圣家庭在尘世一角静谧发光
items.cardline: Holy family glows quiet in earthly corner

items.title: Christ on the Cross
items.cardline_zh: 暗夜中十字架成为唯一的光
items.cardline: Cross alone shines in the deepest dark

items.title: Portrait of a Woman
items.cardline_zh: 欲言又止的唇上时光凝滞
items.cardline: Time pauses on lips half-opened to speak

items.title: Prudence
items.cardline_zh: 镜中映照的不止容颜
items.cardline: Mirror reflects more than just a face

items.title: The Third-Class Carriage
items.cardline_zh: 拥挤车厢里各自沉默的悲欢
items.cardline: Silent joys and sorrows in crowded carriage

items.title: Grooms and horses
items.cardline_zh: 骏马低头嗅着画外的风
items.cardline: Steeds sniff the wind from beyond the scroll

items.title: Christ Crowned with Thorns (Ecce Homo), and the Mourning Virgin (Mater Dolorosa)
items.title_zh: 基督受荆冠（看这个人）与哀悼圣母（痛苦圣母）
items.cardline_zh: 荆棘冠下目光望向无尽处
items.cardline: Thorn-crowned gaze pierces the infinite

items.title: The Holy Family with the Young Saint John the Baptist
items.title_zh: 圣家族与幼年圣施洗约翰
items.cardline_zh: 孩童嬉戏中藏着神圣寓言
items.cardline: Holy parable hides in children's play

items.title: Krishna Steals the Gopis’ Clothing: Page from a Dispersed Bhagavata Purana Manuscript
items.title_zh: 克里希纳偷走牧牛女们的衣服：来自一部散佚的《薄伽梵往世书》手稿的一页
items.cardline_zh: 水中倒映的羞怯，树梢藏匿的嬉笑
items.cardline: Shy reflections in water, giggles hidden in leaves

items.title: The Monk Daitō Kokushi as a Beggar
items.cardline_zh: 破钵盛满虚空，竹杖点醒尘埃
items.cardline: Cracked bowl holds the void, bamboo staff wakes the dust

items.title: Portrait of a Woman
items.cardline_zh: 眼神里藏着未拆的信，唇角抿着欲言又止
items.cardline: Eyes keep unread letters, lips hold back words

items.title: Flower Baskets and Farmer's Hat
items.cardline_zh: 竹篮盛满夏梦，斗笠斜倚秋风
items.cardline: Basket holds summer dreams, hat leans into autumn wind

items.title: The Parable of the Mote and the Beam
items.cardline_zh: 木屑刺入眼睛，梁木横亘灵魂
items.cardline: Splinter stings the eye, beam looms in the soul

items.title: Christ Carrying the Cross, with the Crucifixion; The Resurrection, with the Pilgrims of Emmaus
items.title_zh: 基督背负十字架，与受难图；复活，与以马忤斯的朝圣者
items.cardline_zh: 十字架压弯脊背，黎明却从石缝渗出
items.cardline: Cross bends the back, but dawn seeps through the stone

items.title: Outing to Zhang Gong's Grotto
items.cardline_zh: 岩洞吞下笑声，水流带走墨迹
items.cardline: Cave swallows laughter, stream washes away ink

items.title: Willows and Bridge
items.cardline_zh: 柳丝垂钓流水，桥拱托起行云
items.cardline: Willow branches fish the stream, bridge arch lifts the clouds

items.title: Self-Portrait
items.cardline_zh: 画笔凝视自己，阴影里住着另一个我
items.cardline: Brush stares at itself, another self dwells in shadows

items.title: Women Picking Olives
items.cardline_zh: 橄榄坠入蓝漩涡，手臂摇碎午后光
items.cardline: Olives fall into blue swirl, arms shatter afternoon light
